notes: Rock-OS uses active as the current dashboard session.
Public shows dashboards but hides Profiles.
Path sessions show only one dashboard folder, such as Profiles/Kids.
Add future sessions to the sessions list so they appear in the home-page dropdown.

sessions.name: Public
sessions.description: Shows normal dashboard sections, but hides Profiles.

sessions.name: Kids
sessions.description: Shows only the Kids profile dashboard.
